info.title: G2 API
info.description: G2 API for accessing product reviews, ratings, categories, buyer intent data, and syndication content. Follows the JSON:API specification.

get.description: Returns answers to survey questions, optionally filtered by product.

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter answers updated after this date (RFC3339 format)

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter answers updated before this date (RFC3339 format)

get.description: Returns a single answer by ID.
Returns company information for buyer intent tracking.
View visitor events to product pages for buyer intent analysis.
Search buyer intent activity over time, grouped by company.
View conversions from tracked prospects.
Returns product categories with hierarchy information.

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter categories updated after this date

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter categories updated before this date

get.description: Returns a single category by ID.
Returns products with ratings and review counts.
Returns product details including categories and vendor info.
Returns reviews for a specific product.
Returns survey questions used in reviews.

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter questions updated after this date

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter questions updated before this date

get.description: Returns a single survey question by ID.
Returns all webhook subscriptions.

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter subscriptions updated after this date

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter subscriptions updated before this date

get.description: Returns a single webhook subscription.
Returns reviews with ratings and user information.

parameters.name: filter[submitted_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter reviews submitted after this date

parameters.name: filter[submitted_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter reviews submitted before this date

parameters.name: filter[moderated_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter reviews moderated after this date

parameters.name: filter[moderated_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter reviews moderated before this date

get.description: Returns a single review with detailed answers.
Returns a list of vendors.
Returns a single vendor by ID.
Returns products available for syndication with vendor and category data.

parameters.name: filter[review_count_gteq]
parameters.description: Filter products with at least this many reviews

get.description: Returns a single syndication product with aggregated data.
Returns competitor products for a given product.
Returns product ratings breakdown including ease of use, setup, and support scores.
Returns statistical answer distribution for a question including z-scores and percentiles.
Returns reviews available for syndication with full content and user details.

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_gt]
parameters.description: Filter reviews updated after this date

parameters.name: filter[updated_at_lt]
parameters.description: Filter reviews updated before this date

get.description: Returns comments on syndication reviews.

parameters.name: filter[my_api_responses]
parameters.description: Filter to only show your API responses

parameters.name: filter[vendor_responses]
parameters.description: Filter to only show vendor responses

post.description: Submit an official response comment on a review.

get.description: Returns integration reviews with ratings.
Retrieve syndication snippet data for products.

post_url.description: URL to post webhook events to
